title: GEP Genetic Evolution Loop
interaction_flow: Daemon → Daemon: acquireLock() — singleton guard via evolver.pid
Daemon → Daemon: isPendingSolidify(state) — skip cycle if prior run awaits solidify
Daemon → evolve: evolve.run() — triggers one evolution cycle
evolve → AssetStore: loadGenes() → Gene[] (reads genes.json + genes.jsonl, deduplicates by id)
evolve → AssetStore: loadCapsules() → Capsule[] (reads capsules.json + capsules.jsonl)
evolve → AssetStore: readAllEvents() → EvolutionEvent[] (for recentEvents history)
evolve → evolve: extractSignals() → string[] (from context/env)
evolve → Selector: selectGeneAndCapsule({genes, capsules, signals, memoryAdvice, driftEnabled}) → {selectedGene, selector, selectionPath, memoryUsed, memoryEvidence}

Selector → Selector: selectGene(genes, signals, opts) → {selected, alternatives, driftIntensity} (score by signals_match overlap; applies preferredGeneId multiplier; downweights hard-fail anti_patterns)
Selector → Selector: selectCapsule(capsules, signals) → Capsule|null (trigger field overlap)
Selector → Selector: computeDriftIntensity({driftEnabled, genePoolSize, memoryEvidence}) → float[0,1]
evolve → evolve: computeAdaptiveStrategyPolicy({signals, selectedGene, recentEvents}) → {forceInnovate, blastRadiusMaxFiles, highRiskGene, cautiousExecution}

evolve → Mutation: buildMutation({signals, selectedGene, driftEnabled, allowHighRisk, personalityState}) → Mutation{id, type, category, trigger_signals, target, expected_effect, risk_level, rationale}
evolve → Prompt: buildGepPrompt({nowIso, context, signals, selector, selectedGene, capsuleCandidates, genesPreview, capsulesPreview, strategyPolicy, mutation, ...}) → string
evolve → LLM Agent: emit prompt — agent performs code edits in workspace
evolve → AssetStore: save run state to evolution_solidify_state.json (run_id, signals, selected_gene_id, mutation, blast_radius_estimate)
evolve → Daemon: return (run complete, awaiting solidify)
--- SOLIDIFY PHASE (triggered separately or auto-rejected in bridgeless mode) ---
Daemon → Solidify: solidify({intent, summary, dryRun, rollbackOnFailure})
Solidify → Solidify: readStateForSolidify() → reads evolution_solidify_state.json
Solidify → PolicyCheck: checkConstraints({gene, blast, blastRadiusEstimate, repoRoot}) → {ok, violations[]}
PolicyCheck → PolicyCheck: isForbiddenPath(path, gene.constraints.forbidden_paths)
PolicyCheck → PolicyCheck: classifyBlastSeverity({blast, maxFiles}) → {severity: within_limit|approaching_limit|exceeded|critical_overrun|hard_cap_breach}
PolicyCheck → PolicyCheck: compareBlastEstimate(estimate, actual) → {drifted}
PolicyCheck → PolicyCheck: isValidationCommandAllowed(cmd) — blocks shell injection, evals, rm -rf
Solidify → Solidify: run validation commands (gene.validation steps)
Solidify → PolicyCheck: classifyFailureMode({constraintViolations, protocolViolations, validation, canary}) → {mode: hard|soft, reasonClass, retryable}
Solidify → Solidify: computeProcessScores({constraintCheck, validation, protocolViolations, canary, blast, geneUsed, signals, mutation}) → {validation_pass_rate, blast_control, ...}
alt outcome == success
Solidify → AssetStore: appendEventJsonl(EvolutionEvent) — persists to events.jsonl
Solidify → AssetStore: upsertGene(updatedGene) — writes genes.json
Solidify → AssetStore: upsertCapsule(newCapsule) — writes capsules.json
Solidify → Solidify: adaptGeneFromLearning({gene, outcomeStatus:'success', learningSignals, failureMode}) — broadens gene.signals_match with problem/area tags
alt outcome == failed
Solidify → AssetStore: appendFailedCapsule(failedCapsule) — capped at 200, trimmed to 100
Solidify → Solidify: adaptGeneFromLearning({gene, outcomeStatus:'failed', learningSignals, failureMode}) — appends anti_patterns, preserves signals_match
opt rollbackOnFailure && mode==hard → git checkout -- . + git clean -fd
Solidify → Daemon: return SolidifyResult{ok, gene, event, capsule, blast, validation, constraintCheck}
Daemon → Daemon: adaptive sleep (min 2s, max 300s; 4x on saturation signals)
key_relationships: Daemon orchestrates: calls evolve.run() in while(true) loop with adaptive sleep
evolve depends_on AssetStore: loadGenes, loadCapsules, readAllEvents, save run state
Solidify depends_on PolicyCheck: checkConstraints, classifyBlastSeverity, classifyFailureMode, isValidationCommandAllowed
Solidify depends_on AssetStore: appendEventJsonl, upsertGene, upsertCapsule, appendFailedCapsule
Selector reads Gene.signals_match and Gene.anti_patterns to score candidates
Mutation reads personalityState.rigor / risk_tolerance to cap risk_level
solidify called by: Daemon (auto-solidify/reject), CLI 'node index.js solidify', CLI 'node index.js review --approve'

data_objects.Gene: { type:'Gene', id, category:repair|optimize|innovate, signals_match:string[], strategy:string[], validation:string[], constraints:{max_files, forbidden_paths}, anti_patterns, learning_history }
data_objects.Capsule: { type:'Capsule', id, gene:geneId, trigger:string[], summary, confidence, outcome:{status, score} }
data_objects.Mutation: { type:'Mutation', id:'mut_*', category:repair|optimize|innovate, trigger_signals, target, expected_effect, risk_level:low|medium|high, rationale }
data_objects.EvolutionEvent: { id, run_id, intent, outcome:{status, score}, signals, blast_radius, mutation, gene_id, timestamp }
data_objects.SelectorResult: { selected:Gene|null, alternatives:Gene[], driftIntensity:float, reason:string[], selectionPath, memoryUsed:bool, memoryEvidence:int }
data_objects.SolidifyResult: { ok:bool, gene, event, capsule, blast, validation, constraintCheck, failureReason, failureMode }

important_notes: evolve.js is obfuscated in source; behavior reconstructed from test files and index.js
The two-phase design: evolve.run() makes code edits (phase 1), solidify() evaluates+persists (phase 2)
In --loop mode with EVOLVE_BRIDGE=false, pending runs are auto-rejected (state-only, no git rollback)
Pending solidify guard: Daemon skips new cycles if evolution_solidify_state.json shows unprocessed run
Adaptive drift: computeDriftIntensity decays from high-drift (low memory evidence) to low-drift (mature memory)
Anti-pattern accumulation: failed runs add Gene.anti_patterns; Selector downweights genes with hard-fail anti_patterns
OMLS idle scheduling: during idle windows, Daemon triggers skillDistiller.autoDistillFromFailures() and explore.tryExplore()
Hollow commit guard: policyCheck blocks runs that only modify GEP asset files (no real code changed)
BLAST_RADIUS_HARD_CAP_FILES and BLAST_RADIUS_HARD_CAP_LINES are absolute system limits enforced regardless of gene constraints

solidify.js: computeProcessScores({constraintCheck, validation, protocolViolations, canary, blast, geneUsed, signals, mutation})

source_files_analyzed: src/evolve.js (obfuscated — behavior inferred from index.js + test/evolvePolicy.test.js)
